rationale: Both reviews independently converge on a legitimate, well-grounded finding (default_components duplicates the pipeline's own _dit_modules declaration, citing matching pipeline_sdxl.py/registry.py locations) that is thematically adjacent to but not identical to dsocek's actual ground-truth ask (driving naming fixes from _packed_modules_mapping/stacked_params_mapping), which appears to concern code removed before the final diff. X edges ahead because it explicitly notes the before/after validation images were provided in the PR body — directly matching the one clearly-resolvable ground-truth thread (xuechendi's validation request) — and adds a distinct, plausible text-encoder LoRA gap; Y's two hardcoded-list comments (374/375) are largely redundant restatements of the same point, though Y does catch a genuine test-coverage gap (no SDXL integration test) that X marked PASS without scrutiny. Neither includes a LATENT GAP CHECK section.
